narrative.summary: Bar/restaurant that frequently hosts jazz/sets; good “music + dinner” anchor west end.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I had been to NeuLokal on various occasions before, but I can’t forget my experience last Sunday. While looking for a venue for our high school alumni gathering, I contacted Evrim and Bilge. They prepared a special menu for us, organized the tables and the ambiance, and even went far beyond making us feel at home with thoughtful touches like placing our school’s logo at the entrance and adding beautiful flowers to the tables. I am truly grateful to them.
Thanks to their efforts, the alumni event I organized was a great success, and all 30 attendees left with a smile on their faces. From now on, we already know where we’ll be meeting next. Thank you very much for everything!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I celebrated my birthday here and couldn’t have asked for a better experience. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, with amazing Turkish food and live, soft jazzy music by the “Love Pocket Duo.” Every dish was fresh and delicious—the babaganoush was honestly the best I’ve ever had!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "We went to watch Faith Amour and her band perform. I would love to see other local artists performing there! The entire night was delightful! The food is delicious!"
